title: [Bug]: Complex CAST operations used as predicates are encountering an Internal Error.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_casts (id UInt32, value Float64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_casts (id, value) VALUES (1, 0.7646335288457784), (2, NULL);
SELECT (- (CAST(value AS Int32)) + 1) FROM test_casts WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT 1 WHERE (- (CAST(value AS Int32))) < (- (CAST(0.7646335288457784 AS DateTime));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_casts WHERE created_at < toDateTime(NULL);
key_bug_features: Complex CAST operations as predicates causing internal error
